productDisplayName: Crusoe Men Navy Blue Skier Boxer Shorts
description: Navy blue boxer shorts from crusoe made of mercerised 100% cotton fabric, elasticated waistband with branding on the centre, double button fly, buttoned pocket at the back and printed inner for label free comfort Wash care Machine wash cold Do not bleach Tumble dry low Cold iron as needed Do not dry clean This classic pair of boxers from Crusoe are crafted using soft absorbent cotton that lets the fabric contour your hips and allows you to stretch with ease. The printed label on the inner allows abrasion-free comfort while the superior fabric is perfect for better leg movement. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model with waist 32"
